The ultimate live
advertising network

Vodra offers the easiest way to monetize your livestream. We match creators of all sizes with awesome brands to promote.

Here's how it works.

Browser
Platform
Broadcast
sits on theBroadcast layer.

This content is controlled directly by creators through the use of live broadcast software.

The Platform layer is where ads are currently served from. We are able to capture data from here to enrich our own offering.

Creators use our broadcast integration to serve ads. We track everything, charge the advertisers, and pay the creators. This makes us fully platform agnostic and unblockable.

Take control of your stream

A Real Creator Economy

Take part in a network powered by its own users. Earn Vodra Tokens for every transaction completed on the network.

Buy $VDR

Bridge

Swap your $VDR from one chain to another with our integrated token bridge.
